ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workspaces" (
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workspace */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the workspace belongs to */,
  "workspace_name" TEXT /* Name of the workspace */,
  "workspace_type" TEXT /* Type of the workspace (e.g., MatrixWorkspace) */,
  "workspace_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the workspace (e.g., Input, Output) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the workspace (e.g., wavelength) */,
  "binning" TEXT /* Binning of the workspace */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the workspace */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the workspace was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the workspace */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the workspace was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the workspace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workspace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspaces_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspaces_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workspace_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workspace the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspace_versions_workspace_id FOREIGN KEY ("workspace_id") REFERENCES workspaces ("workspace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "output_workspaces" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output workspace */,
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workspace the output belongs to */,
  "output_name" TEXT /* Name of the output workspace */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of the output workspace (e.g., MatrixWorkspace) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the output workspace */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the output workspace */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the output workspace was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the output workspace */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the output workspace was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_output_workspaces_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_output_workspaces_workspace_id FOREIGN KEY ("workspace_id") REFERENCES workspaces ("workspace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., number) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the parameter is mandatory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the parameter */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_versions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the log belongs to */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., status update, note) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message or note in the log */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the log */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workspace_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workspace the log belongs to */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., status update, note) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message or note in the log */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the log */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspace_logs_workspace_id FOREIGN KEY ("workspace_id") REFERENCES workspaces ("workspace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspace_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "output_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* ID of the output workspace the log belongs to */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., status update, note) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message or note in the log */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the log */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_output_logs_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES output_workspaces ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_output_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the log belongs to */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., status update, note) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message or note in the log */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the log */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_logs_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
